title: App Settings - General - Account
scenario: Account section under App Settings > General displays active Log in button and Share Data toggle for guest users
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or profile icon to access the side menu.
3. Tap 'App Settings' (or navigate to App Settings → General).
5. Observe the 'Your Account' section while not logged in (as a guest/quest user).
6. Verify that a 'Log in' button is displayed and is active (tappable).
7. Verify the message "You are not currently logged in" is displayed.
9. Verify a toggle button is present for Share Data.

10. Verify the description text explains that sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) helps improve the experience, and that no personal information is shared with third parties.
11. Tap the back button (top-left or system back) to return to the App Settings page.
12. Verify that the App Settings page is displayed.
expected: The Account section displays an active 'Log in' button with the message "You are not currently logged in". The 'Share Data' section shows a toggle button with a description about sharing basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to improve the experience, noting no personal info is shared with third parties. Tapping back returns to the App Settings page.
